inputs.label: Environmental Score
inputs.businessContext: Aggregated environmental performance score. Higher is better.

businessContext_i18n.en: Aggregated environmental performance score. Higher is better.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplanmış çevresel performans puanı. Yüksek olan daha iyidir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score de performance environnementale agrégé. Plus il est élevé, mieux c'est.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación agregada de desempeño ambiental. Mayor es mejor.

inputs.label: Social Score
inputs.businessContext: Aggregated social performance score. Higher is better.

businessContext_i18n.en: Aggregated social performance score. Higher is better.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplanmış sosyal performans puanı. Yüksek olan daha iyidir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score de performance sociale agrégé. Plus il est élevé, mieux c'est.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación agregada de desempeño social. Mayor es mejor.

inputs.label: Governance Score
inputs.businessContext: Aggregated governance performance score. Higher is better.

businessContext_i18n.en: Aggregated governance performance score. Higher is better.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam yönetişim performans puanı. Yüksek olması daha iyidir.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score agrégé de performance en gouvernance. Plus élevé est meilleur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación agregada de desempeño de gobierno. Mayor es mejor.

inputs.label: Weight Environment
inputs.businessContext: Weight for environmental score. Must be >0. Sum of all weights should be positive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight for environmental score. Must be >0. Sum of all weights should be positive.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çevre puanı için ağırlık. >0 olmalıdır. Tüm ağırlıkların toplamı pozitif olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht für den Umwelt-Score. Muss >0 sein. Summe aller Gewichte sollte positiv sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids pour le score environnemental. Doit être >0. La somme de tous les poids doit être positive.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso para la puntuación ambiental. Debe ser >0. La suma de todos los pesos debe ser positiva.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids pour le score de gouvernance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso para la puntuación de gobernanza.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
